metadata.description: daemon 线程: Daemon thread, which automatically terminates when the main thread exits without blocking the program's exit. Python code example: ```python import threading def worker(): while True: print("Working...") # Create a daemon thread daemon_thread = threading.Thread(target=worker, daemon=True) daemon_thread.start() print("Main thread continues to run...") ``` In this example, `daemon=True` is used when creating a thread. The main thread will exit without waiting for the daemon thread to complete its execution.
